_note: P3 SIMULATED IdP directory (ADR-0034 / ADR-0003). Maps a dev user id to the clearance the Gateway mints into a signed JWT at POST /v1/auth/token. This stands in for a real federated IdP — dev/demo ONLY, never production. Mirrors rag-engine's P1 dev users so the demo path (priya, guest-public, ...) is stable across the trust-boundary change.
